org.bukkit.metadata.MetadataValue

Packages that use MetadataValue
Package
Description
org.bukkit.metadata
Classes dedicated to providing a layer of plugin specified data on various Minecraft concepts.

    Description
    class 
    FixedMetadataValue
    Deprecated.
    This system is extremely misleading and does not cleanup values for metadatable entities that have been removed.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NotNull List<MetadataValue>
    Metadatable.getMetadata(@NotNull String metadataKey)
    Deprecated.
    Returns a list of previously set metadata values from the implementing object's metadata store.
    @NotNull List<MetadataValue>
    MetadataStore.getMetadata(T subject, @NotNull String metadataKey)
    Deprecated.
    Returns all metadata values attached to an object.
    @NotNull List<MetadataValue>
    MetadataStoreBase.getMetadata(T subject, @NotNull String metadataKey)
    Deprecated.
    Returns all metadata values attached to an object.
